positive: A mystical bioluminescent forest scene with a strong central composition. The artwork features stylized glowing flora, intricate glowing mushrooms, and cascading bioluminescent vines. Include clean, detailed silhouettes of elegant deer and ethereal flying moths. The color palette must be restricted to deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, indigo, and vibrant cyan glows, emphasizing high contrast and saturated neon accents against a dark background. Illustration style should be a mix of Neo-Fairy Tale fantasy and detailed graphic illustration, highly suitable for a clean, centered apparel print, studio lighting, vector art aesthetic.
